title: Manepear's modified scythe resourcepack
description: This Mod brings a slightly modified scythe from ManePear's videos into your game.
body:
This is the resource pack for the Datapack "ManePear's modified scythe".

**Important: It won't work on its own which means that you have to download the datapack aswell to be able to play the resourcepack.
This resourcepack does NOT change the Mace's texture! It adds a new one to the game.** 

This would be the link for the datapack download:
https://modrinth.com/project/manepear-modified-scythe-datapack

Modifiers of the scythe:
Attack damage: 13
Attack speed: -2
While holding the item: speed, 20 hearts total
Texture modifiers: some blood drops were added

I have made the real scythe aswell so go check it out too!
(https://modrinth.com/datapack/scythe-manepear)
